completed_slice: Added and tested an exact-workflow-run GitHub artifact-list adapter that rejects missing, expired, duplicate, cross-run, or mutable-identity evidence before release-packet verification.
verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in isolation; committed module was fetched back from the test commit and matched the validated logic.
remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still needs valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN plus an observable successful workflow run. No deployment, hostname, DNS, or served-content claim is made.
next_action: Wire the normalized artifact-list manifest into an exact-run workflow observation step, download the accepted artifact archive, verify packet bytes and digest, then dispatch Cloudflare production only from the same immutable commit.
